description_long: This kiosk is a rectangular, elevated structure with a flat wooden deck and a perimeter railing, supported by four robust columns with decorative bases and capitals. The railing is painted white with red posts and a blue trim, giving the structure a visually striking appearance. The deck surface is made of dark, weathered wood planks, divided into two sections by a central seam. The lower portion of the kiosk is enclosed with plain, light-colored panels, while the upper deck is open and accessible. The columns and trim details suggest a blend of classical and utilitarian design influences. There are no visible doors, windows, or signage, and the roof is designed as a walkable platform rather than a traditional overhead cover.
description: A raised, flat-roofed kiosk with a wooden deck, white railings, and four decorative columns supporting an enclosed base. The structure features classical trim details and a walkable upper platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two main columns, the white railing with blue trim, and the wooden deck surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk, the full length of the railing, and the symmetry of the columns.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing the open underside of the deck and the continuous wooden planking.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the entire flat wooden deck and the perimeter railing.
attribute_roof_design: flat wooden deck with perimeter railing, no overhead cover, divided into two sections by a central seam
